programme.title: Sheepy Gets a Haircut
programme.desc: When a friendly sheep turns up in Kiwifruit Valley, Darwin and Newts have to figure out what to do about her very woolly coat.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: On the Spoor of the Big Snake - Part 2: Signs from the Past
programme.desc: Five young explorers continue their travels through [Ai] Ais/Richtersveld Transfrontier Park in South Africa in search of the legendary Big Snake, a spirit that can transform itself into anything. They cross from South Africa into Namibia and discover some ancient art.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Trip to Australia
programme.desc: Zoe bumps her head on a metal light fitting and is looking for medicine to relieve the pain of the headache. In Australia, some people treat headaches with plants. Our heroes will have to meet William and Japaljarri, and they will be surprised!

programme.title: Brain Gain
programme.desc: The principal warns: fail the next exam, and you're out. Everyone worries about Flippy. Carol wants to tutor him, Robbie plans to steal the test, Naomi suggests a nerd disguise, Jessi bakes brain cookies, and Motor builds a genius cap-but smart Flippy isn't so nice!

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: Doki's Double Trouble
programme.desc: While touring Cape Canaveral, Florida, the Team meets Doki's doppelganger, an astronaut named Duncan. Doki excitedly asks - what does it take to be an astronaut? – and Duncan gives him the chance to find out!

programme.title: DiktaThor the Winner
programme.desc: DiktaThor has always dreamed of having power over Bhilka. Suddenly it happens and he takes control over Bhilka. But is it a dream that came true, or is it a nightmare?

programme.title: Panellets
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula prepare a sweet treat as they mix ingredients, shape the dough, and decorate their creations while having fun in the kitchen.

programme.title: Types of Circuits
programme.desc: Making one lamp work is simple but getting a whole bunch of them to light up means Smorph needs to learn how different circuits work.

programme.title: S.W.I.S.H
programme.desc: Max is excited to spend the day with tech billionaire Will Hedges, but he's crushed when his hero steals one of his inventions. Zeke gets birthday money from his grandma and the rest of the gang pitch him ideas on how to spend it.

programme.title: Sheepy Gets a Haircut
programme.desc: When a friendly sheep turns up in Kiwifruit Valley, Darwin and Newts have to figure out what to do about her very woolly coat.

programme.title: Common Lizard
programme.desc: Franky scares Fab and the cubs with some tales of his battles with the common lizard. Fleabag is astonished to see his old school pal Izzy on TV. And Grandad recalls the time he nearly met his end on one of his treacherous adventures in the frozen wastelands.

programme.title: Surviving Space
programme.desc: Once we land on Mars, how will we survive? Host Emily Calandrelli visits NASA's Swamp Works, which tests space suits and machines for Mars-like conditions. We also look at the history of space suits, and discover a futuristic space suit that's in the works at MIT.

programme.title: Hall of Fame
programme.desc: Ian goes to the Video Game Hall of Fame. Back at the garage, Jesse and Julia stretch the meaning of “Hall of Fame” to the limits.

programme.title: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Finn and Kirsten need a medal-winning routine to pursue their goal of the Acro World Championship. So coach Nikki has brought in a top choreographer who hopefully holds the key to success. Meanwhile, things aren't going so well for Dove and Izzy.

programme.title: The Big Decision
programme.desc: Ice dancer Adriano has finally chosen his new dance partner, so it's time to tell Chloe and Ella who he's picked. And speed skater Maddie loves going fast, but a mysterious illness has affected her training. She has a new plan which she hopes will help her recover.

programme.title: Hive Got A Problem
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts follow a bee to learn why it is visiting flowers, and when the hive gets disturbed, they build a new beehive for Heni's garden.

programme.title: Jet Powered Zipline
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts enlist Heni's leaf blower and some science to make the zipline go faster.

programme.title: Do Giants Like Hexagons?
programme.desc: The Giant's Causeway in Northern Ireland is made up of around 40,000 interlocking basalt columns, most of which are hexagonal. Nature is very efficient, so it uses this hexagonal arrangement in many places, such as bubbles and beehives.

programme.title: Kiruna - A City Relocates
programme.desc: A church that 'migrates” to a new location kilometers away. A key event in the relocation of the northern Swedish city of Kiruna. As iron ore mining encroaches on its territory, large parts of the city are being forced to make way.

programme.desc: The weekly half-hour program delivers in-depth reporting on topical political issues and newsworthy events. Revealing the story behind the stories, 'Close up' is informative, gripping and visually powerful.

programme.title: Beijing Spring - The Democracy Wall Movement In China
programme.desc: Mao's death was followed by a very short period of freedom of expression in China. Known as the 'Beijing Spring', it was part of the new head of state Deng Xiaoping's desire to distance himself from the mistakes of the Cultural Revolution.

programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: E241 - Pen Pal
programme.desc: Peppa has a French pen pal, a girl donkey, named Delphine. They also speak to each other on the telephone. Although Peppa speaks English and Delphine speaks French, they discover that they love lots of the same things.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day's agenda. Airing CNBC's award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day's agenda. Airing CNBC's award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

E2 - Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Young hyenas compete in tug of war, mischievous parrots play at picking apart tourists’ cars, and Atlantic spotted dolphins enjoy sophisticated social games amid seaweed—all following specific rules that hone social bonds.

programme.title: E2 - Loka the Baby Elephant
programme.desc: Every year, the biggest elephant congregation in Asia occurs in Minneriya National Park. Here in this sacred place, baby Loka is born. Watch as he learns to suckle, swim and handle his trunk among the mêlée of giants that make up his family.

programme.title: E1 - The Power of Playtime
programme.desc: Explore the ways that animals use play, including young gibbons in Thailand that practice falling from branches, elderly macaques that preserve their brains with playtime, and games that sharpen the profound intelligence of African elephants.

programme.title: E2 - Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Young hyenas compete in tug of war, mischievous parrots play at picking apart tourists’ cars, and Atlantic spotted dolphins enjoy sophisticated social games amid seaweed—all following specific rules that hone social bonds.

programme.title: E1 - The Power of Playtime

programme.title: E2 - Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Young hyenas compete in tug of war, mischievous parrots play at picking apart tourists’ cars, and Atlantic spotted dolphins enjoy sophisticated social games amid seaweed—all following specific rules that hone social bonds.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of Jungles
programme.desc: Plunge into crystal-clear seas to explore the Tubbataha Reef, which rests on an extinct underwater volcano where shallow lagoons shelter sea turtles and tiger sharks. Take flight with tarsiers as they hunt insects using powerful leaps between trees.

programme.title: E3 - Praying for Rain
programme.desc: Trail Anastasia as her herd splits to protect two precious elephant calves, while Kuleta retakes territory for her remaining cheetah cubs. Join wild dog Phoenix’s search for a new mate as the skies open up and rain begins to heal the parched land.

programme.title: E4 - The Inside Story
programme.desc: Look behind the scenes and meet the innovative teams working to preserve and protect Kenya’s wildlife. Check out Save the Elephants’ radio-tracking-collar system, a drone that monitors wild dog packs, and a local team of Maasai cheetah trackers.

E12 - Sweetieland Saga
programme.desc: Evil Pea cheats Chilli out of winning floofy teddies at a funfair made from sweets, so Supertato and the Veggies must get the teddies back before it's too late!

programme.title: E4 - Weather Balloons
programme.desc: Zim's weather balloons have gone missing and Mayor Oki's weather forecasts are completely wrong. Messy, Zoom and Zim must fly through the skies to track the balloons down.

programme.title: E36 - The Water Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels learn all about where water comes from, and their journey takes them from the sea and back to the kitchen sink and another drink of water. Wow! Water is amazing!

programme.title: E49 - Go Jet Academy: Global Gameshow
programme.desc: It's the Go Jetters as you've never seen them before as they take part in a disco dazzling around the world gameshow!

programme.title: E48 - Chocolate Hills, Philippines
programme.desc: Greedy Grandmaster Glitch has been gorging on chocolate and wants more! The Grimbots discover a place called the Chocolate Hills on Bohol Island in the Philippines and take him there.

programme.title: E36 - Moon's Exhibition
programme.desc: A trip to the art gallery unexpectedly helps Duck with the hunt for his lost toy Rhino.

programme.title: E12 - Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: E13 - The Breakfast Badge
programme.desc: Tag's feeling grumpy because he didn't eat his breakfast, uh-oh!

programme.title: E7 - Asparagus
programme.desc: Asparagus shares his deep affection for wet weather in the song 'I Love The Rain'.

programme.title: E12 - Sweetieland Saga
programme.desc: Evil Pea cheats Chilli out of winning floofy teddies at a funfair made from sweets, so Supertato and the Veggies must get the teddies back before it's too late!

programme.title: E107 - Straws
programme.desc: Big straws appear in Teletubbyland and Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po wonder what to do with them. The Teletubbies blow through the straws to make colourful bubbles.

programme.title: E1 - Rain
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'rain' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today's episode is all about rain!

programme.title: E5 - Itchy
programme.desc: Farmer Fuddle's chickens have escaped. Their feathers make Vivienne Volcano very itchy, so Messy has to find a way to scratch her itches and round up the chickens

programme.title: E21 - Panic At The Pumpkin Patch
programme.desc: It's pumpkin-picking day at Jackson's farm, but something spooky has been scaring all the pumpkin pickers. Mojo and Bo need to find out what's going on, and chase some ghosts!

programme.title: E18 - Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: E12 - The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E26 - El Gran Final
programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: E15 - Trains
programme.desc: All aboard the Dad Train! Bingo goes from home to daycare to her job at the vet every morning, but there's trouble on the line as a mischievous Bluey throws everyone off schedule.

programme.title: E39 - The Getting On Badge
programme.desc: When the squirrels upset the mole by being noisy, Duggee suggests some team building.

programme.desc: It's the Go Jetters as you've never seen them before as they take part in a disco dazzling around the world gameshow!

programme.desc: The art gallery is holding a celebration of the colour pink and Sarah is keen to take part.

programme.desc: Benjamin can't find his favourite toy, Wonder Vole anywhere. Stanley suggests they retrace his steps but have no luck. Maybe Wonder Vole Pyjamas will help Benjamin feel brave.

programme.desc: From broccoli soup to cheeseburgers and blue cheese, the funny animals chat about the best and worst things to eat.

programme.title: E5 - Itchy
programme.desc: Farmer Fuddle's chickens have escaped. Their feathers make Vivienne Volcano very itchy, so Messy has to find a way to scratch her itches and round up the chickens

programme.title: E21 - Panic At The Pumpkin Patch
programme.desc: It's pumpkin-picking day at Jackson's farm, but something spooky has been scaring all the pumpkin pickers. Mojo and Bo need to find out what's going on, and chase some ghosts!

programme.title: E18 - Rain
programme.desc: When a heavy summer rain thunders over the Heeler home, Bluey is determined to dam the water in the front yard, while Mum tries to stop her constantly tracking mud into the house.

programme.title: E12 - The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E26 - El Gran Final
programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: E15 - Trains
programme.desc: All aboard the Dad Train! Bingo goes from home to daycare to her job at the vet every morning, but there's trouble on the line as a mischievous Bluey throws everyone off schedule.

programme.title: E39 - The Getting On Badge
programme.desc: When the squirrels upset the mole by being noisy, Duggee suggests some team building.

programme.title: E49 - Go Jet Academy: Global Gameshow
programme.desc: It's the Go Jetters as you've never seen them before as they take part in a disco dazzling around the world gameshow!

programme.title: E38 - The Art Of Pink
programme.desc: The art gallery is holding a celebration of the colour pink and Sarah is keen to take part.

programme.title: E51 - Wonder Vole
programme.desc: Benjamin can't find his favourite toy, Wonder Vole anywhere. Stanley suggests they retrace his steps but have no luck. Maybe Wonder Vole Pyjamas will help Benjamin feel brave.

programme.title: E9 - I Don't Like Bananas
programme.desc: From broccoli soup to cheeseburgers and blue cheese, the funny animals chat about the best and worst things to eat.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E13 - The Breakfast Badge
programme.desc: Tag's feeling grumpy because he didn't eat his breakfast, uh-oh!

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E7 - Asparagus
programme.desc: Asparagus shares his deep affection for wet weather in the song 'I Love The Rain'.

programme.title: E12 - Sweetieland Saga
programme.desc: Evil Pea cheats Chilli out of winning floofy teddies at a funfair made from sweets, so Supertato and the Veggies must get the teddies back before it's too late!

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Debate
programme.desc: Live debate show on the key topic of the day with four guests from different spots of the globe, from Monday to Thursday. Keep up with up-to-date issues from all over the world in politics, culture, sports, economy and healthcare. Get the latest facts and expert opinions about the most essential stories happening around us and draw your own conclusions. The show is well known for its dynamics due to live debates with its various guests.

programme.title: E15 - Nothin'to It But To Do It
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: E16 - Free Philly
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: French In A Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let's learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for “happiness” and various forms of “joy” through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: E37
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Michael Wong
programme.desc: Michael Wong rose to prominence on the big screen in the 80s with his “half Chinese, half foreign' identity and eye-catching appearance, from the early rebellious and unruly big boy to the tough and strong policeman role later. Looking back the bygone days, he barely knew Cantonese but was fortunate to meet a like-minded partner who helped him through the break-in period, and which film from his decades-long career impressed him the most? After played countless roles, how does he feel about his identity as an actor?

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Chan Hing Kai
programme.desc: Since the 1980's, Chan Hing Kai has created numerous love comedies, yet he opened up that he was “forced” to write them at that time. Later on, he wrote and co-directed “La Brassiere”, a film which entertains without being obscene. He reveals that one of the leading actor, Lau Ching Wan, complained to him afterwards... In this episode, Hing Kai is invited to share the untold stories from his writing career and talk about the changing ecology of screenwriting in the film industry.

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Kwan Kam Pang
programme.desc: “Rogue”, one of the most significant film of Director Stanley Kwan, earned him the Best Director and made the characters “Fleur” and “Chan Chen-Pang” a legend. He reveals the story behind the film's directorial position and the obstacles he encountered along the production, as well as talking about his delicate sense of portraying women's stories.

programme.title: E5 - From Lyon To Charente-Maritime
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde explores the decor trends of the Lyon metropolis before heading to the Atlantic coast, in Charente-Maritime, to discover its charms.

programme.title: E92 - Nicolas Jurnjack, Hairdresser To The Stars
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E20 - Sarah Lavoine/Camellia/Petit Bateau/Tartan
programme.desc: After interior design, beautiful shops and furnishings, Sarah Lavoine has launched a clothing collection. All there is to know about the camellia, the emblematic flower of Chanel. For 130 years, the Petit Bateau brand has established itself with force and tenderness. Dare the square, or how to wear tartan.

programme.title: E9 - Around Bread
programme.desc: Ricardo joins Isabelle to celebrate bread in all its forms: a savory garlic version, perfect for sharing, and a brioche variation with chocolate, cranberries, and ginger.

programme.title: E107
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E57 - Les Gets (2)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Les Gets, going to the market to meet local residents. Today, she focuses on a hike under the stars and Herens cow cheeses.

programme.title: E7 - Textured Meals For Babies!
programme.desc: On the baby food shelves, purees are being dethroned. A close look at the range of so called textured meals sold in stores. Also covered: naan bread, from tradition to industrialization; miso paste; the origins of the pretzel.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Play All The Best Games!
programme.desc: It's time to play all the best games with Kii & Yii! The fun begins with a high-stakes game of Red Light, Green Light, where Jeepbot is 'It' with a slime cannon blaster! Then, Kii & Yii play a fun game of life-size Snakes & Ladders, complete with toy snakes & big ladders. The competition continues with a game of Duck, Duck, Goose in mini race cars & a summer pool party game of Marco Polo with Snappy Croc!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E4 - Baby John's Fun Learning Adventure!
programme.desc: Join Baby John on a fun learning adventure! First, playing dress-up is so much fun! Baby John transforms into a pirate, Jack is an astronaut & Jill is a beautiful princess! Then, 'please' & 'thank you' are very important words, & Baby John learns just how magical they can be. The learning continues as his family helps him to understand the opposite concept of 'open & shut' & Dad helps him play with his brand-new color train!

programme.title: E1 - Kittens, Tutus & Fun Tea Parties!
programme.desc: It's CeCe Time, full of kittens, tutus & fun! The big day arrives when CeCe gets her very own adorable kitten! She loves her new friend & wants to put on a show, so she gets in her ballerina outfit to dance for her kitty. Then, after hosting many tea parties for her stuffed animals, CeCe invites her real friends JJ & Bella over for a high tea party! From ice skating with Mom to imagining stick ponies are unicorns, it's always a fun & graceful day with CeCe!

programme.title: E1 - Taking on the Baddest Baddies in Town!
programme.desc: It's up to Mila & Morphle to take on the baddest baddies in town! The trouble begins when the Bandits use robot versions of Mila & Morphle to cause chaos. Then, the friends discover a Mirror World where they meet Orphle, Morphle's naughty reflection. When Orphle escapes & causes trouble, they have to stop him! The action continues as the Bandits use a zapper to turn animals into giants & team up with Orphle to escape from jail!

programme.title: E2 - The Biggest, Craziest Disasters!
programme.desc: Join Digley & Dazey as they face the biggest, craziest disasters! First, a big thunderstorm hits while the crew is working, & they have to rescue Scout after she gets trapped down a hole! Then, while working on a railway bridge, an earthquake causes it to almost fall apart, & the team must fix it before a train crosses! From escaping an avalanche they accidentally caused on a mountain to helping a baby lion that has escaped from the zoo, it's a day of big disasters!

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!

After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E2 - Just Set Up The Chairs/Night Owl/Access Denied/T.G.I. Tuesday/Rigby In The Sky With B
programme.desc: While preparing for a birthday party, Mordecai and Rigby are assigned to set up chairs. They try to prove to Benson they are not slackers, but fail.

programme.title: E414 - Magic Marker/Theatre Night/Some Kind Of Magic
programme.desc: After failing to capture Lamput with their gadgets, the Docs turn to magic. They buy a magic marker that can give them any superpower they draw on their skin.

programme.title: E1143 - Operation Dude Rescue: Part 1/Operation Dude Rescue: Part 2
programme.desc: When the male Titans are captured it's up to Starfire and Raven to rescue them but they're going to need some extra girl power.

programme.title: Concrete Utopia
programme.desc: The world has been reduced to rubble by a massive earthquake.While no one knows for sure how far the ruins stretch, or what the cause of the earthquake may be, in the heart of Seoul there is only one apartment building left standing. It is called Hwang Gung Apartments. As time passes, outsiders start coming in to Hwang Gung Apartments trying to escape the extreme cold. Before long, the apartment residents are unable to cope with the increasing numbers. Feeling a threat to their very survival, the residents enact a special measure.

programme.title: LOVE RESET
programme.desc: “I was perfect until God threw this woman into my life” JUNG-YEOL, the intelligent and handsome loser. “He's like a mosquito. Who knows why they exist?” NARA, the successful careerwoman born with a side of crazy. Despite being brought together by a cinematic encounter that led to their storybook romance, the two have now grown sick of each other's nutty and loserish ways, finally deciding to become perfect strangers again. But......with D-30 until they stamp their papers, a fateful accident inflicts amnesia on the star-crossed couple.

programme.title: LAST MILE
programme.desc: On the day before the Black Friday sale, a box delivered by a global e-commerce company, explodes. The box was sent from one of the biggest warehouses, which has the three-quarter logistic shares around Tokyo. It leads a series of mysterious bombings that terrorize whole of Japan. Elena Funado, who was just appointed as a new director of the warehouse, is forced to control this unprecedented situation with a line manager, Ko Nashimoto. Who planted the bombs? For what purpose? How many bombs are left? - And where are they now? In this modern society, distribution service becomes critical need for our lives and that cannot be stopped. Can Elena and Ko end the serial bombings without stopping blood flowed in “blood vessel”; the global logistics system like a web?

programme.title: Distinction
programme.desc: Ms Tsui is a music teacher in a special education needs (SEN) school, who is not able to switch to a mainstream school due to stereotyping and labelling; Zoey is an underachiever from a Band 1 school, who is struggling for the coming public examination; Ka Ho is a rebellious teenager from a Band 3 school, who idles away his time and doesn't care about his handicapped little brother...Fate drives the three to take part in a musical they deem worthless for their own purposes, which turns out to be a journey of self-discovery towards their dreams and goals.

programme.title: E40 - 女嘉賓陳潔獲專屬告白
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E4 - 解鎖雪山之旅
programme.desc: 以寵物為主角，萌寵們在「鏟屎官」的帶領下，前往上海、大理、深圳三座城市，從城市到田園，從森林到海邊，讓觀眾看到人寵相伴的多樣出行方式，了解到流浪動物的救助計劃，以及探索人與寵物的和諧相處的新方法。

programme.title: E4 - 解鎖雪山之旅
programme.desc: 以寵物為主角，萌寵們在「鏟屎官」的帶領下，前往上海、大理、深圳三座城市，從城市到田園，從森林到海邊，讓觀眾看到人寵相伴的多樣出行方式，了解到流浪動物的救助計劃，以及探索人與寵物的和諧相處的新方法。

programme.desc: Dr Ann Jones ventures into the heart of Borneo's jungle to look for wild orangutan, following a team of dedicated scientists whose work is leading to new insights into one of the world's most intelligent & elusive great apes.

programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.desc: When their exotic vacation flight is cancelled, a couple has no choice but to spend Christmas with each of their divorced parents and dysfunctional families.

E44 - Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, Bernard Kroger and another upstart grocer come up with genius innovations that help invent the modern supermarket.

programme.desc: Jaime looks back at her Southeast Asian adventures, from best dives to memorable tattoos.

programme.desc: Jaime looks back at her Southeast Asian adventures, from strange foods to tough activities.

programme.title: E608 - Blast From The Past
programme.desc: Rick tries not to slip up when making a deal on a pair of snowshoes used in World War II. Then, Rick and Corey get a blast from the past when they go see a hand cannon from the 1600s.

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E5 - Highlights 5
programme.desc: After eight days in the wild, the physical strain is taking its toll on the four remaining celebrities - but they know a place in the final is within reach. For their first task, they split into two teams and build rafts to get them safely across an estuary. However, the tide is coming in and with it the danger of a shark attack. Once across they each have to build their own shelter, to demonstrate what they have learnt from their experience, and are shocked by Bear's demonstration of how to stay hydrated when there is no clean water available. Will they take up the challenge to repeat his very personal method or walk?
